name: Chocolate Can Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a large mixing bowl, empty the contents of the chocolate syrup can into the bowl.
2. Use the can as a measure for the next five ingredients: sugar, flour, oil, coconut, and pecans (chopped).
3. Add eggs, vanilla, and salt to the mixture. Mix well until combined.
4. Pour the batter into an ungreased 13x9x2-inch metal baking dish.
5. Bake at 350°F for approximately 40 minutes.
